Internal Compliance Memo — India (DPDPA, SEBI PIT) for Meridian Infologix Limited (NSE/BSE listed).
Purpose: operational guidance on crypto, ESG, cyber, insider-list, information-barrier, and commercial-term workflows; no UPSI included except where explicitly noted.
DPDPA scope reminder: personal data under the Act includes any data about an identifiable individual; a child is under 18 and requires verifiable consent from parent/guardian.
Do not collect Aadhaar, PAN, or GSTIN in marketing or support forms; sample placeholders only—Aadhaar 0000-0000-0000 (invalid), PAN TESTP0000T (invalid), GSTIN 00ABCD0000A0Z0Z (invalid)—and purge if observed.
EdTech outreach: avoid collecting schoolchild data; if unavoidable, use parental consent templates and store only role contact emails.
Crypto communications: the CoinCart wallet pilot blog may reference public RBI sandbox materials; avoid words implying “listing”, “blackout”, or exchange tie-ups and include risk disclaimers.
ESG/climate claims must match publicly filed BRSR; do not publish non-public emissions targets or unapproved assurance timelines.
Cyber tabletop on 15 July is a drill about phishing and ransomware playbooks; there is no breach, and queries go to infosec@meridianinfologix.example.
Maintain information barriers (“Chinese Wall”) between research, treasury, and corporate development; use segregated folders and access logs in Dataridge.
Insider list template to capture Role, Official Email, Employee ID (e.g., EMP-0000), Reason; do not collect PAN; submit to pitcompliance@meridianinfologix.example within T+1 of inclusion.
Trading window closures will follow the public investor-relations calendar; this note does not announce any blackout period or pricing action.
UPSI—restricted handling: draft commercial terms for Meridian Infologix Limited’s unannounced renewable energy certificate purchase with Blue Banyan Renewables Private Limited are under negotiation and not in the public domain.
Any recipient of the above UPSI must be added to the insider list and comply with SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015; no on- or off-market trades until designated window reopens.
Operations-only crypto note: the “Crypto Treasury Sandbox” is a simulation using synthetic tokens for training; there is no real trading, no exchange integration, and no price-sensitive event.
Data minimisation: webinar sign-up should capture only Name, Work Email, Company, and Region; route consent queries to privacyoffice@meridianinfologix.example.
For SEBI/NSE/BSE queries use compliance@meridianinfologix.example or regulator public helplines as per their websites; do not use personal contact numbers.
